sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_hash (id UInt32, value String, hash_value FixedString(16)) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_hash (id, value, hash_value) VALUES (1, 'example', murmurHash3_128('example'));
UPDATE test_hash SET hash_value = murmurHash3_128(value) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, value, hex(hash_value) AS hex_hash FROM test_hash WHERE id = 1;
SELECT value, hex(murmurHash3_128(value)) AS computed_hash FROM test_hash;
